units.source_text: 1 總額包括客⼾及同業貸款賬⾯總值60億美元（分類為持作出售⽤途資產）及相關預期信貸損失準備2,700萬美元，包括第329⾴附註23「持作出售⽤途資產、持作
units.translation_target_text: 1 The total includes the total carrying amount of loans to customers and peers of US$6 billion (classified as assets held for sale) and related expected credit loss provisions of US$27 million, including Note 23 “Assets held for sale, held for sale” on page 329
units.translation_en: 1 The total includes the total carrying amount of loans to customers and peers of US$6 billion (classified as assets held for sale) and related expected credit loss provisions of US$27 million, including Note 23 “Assets held for sale, held for sale” on page 329

units.source_text: 2 這包括客⼾貸款賬⾯總值72億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備700萬美元，乃與出售法國業務保留住宅和其他零售貸款有關，詳情於第329⾴附註23披露。
units.translation_target_text: 2 This includes a total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$7.2 billion and an associated provision for expected credit losses of US$7.0 million related to the sale of retained residential and other retail loans in France, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.

units.translation_target_text: 1 The total includes the total carrying amount of loans to customers and peers of US$3.7 billion (classified as assets held for sale) and the related expected credit loss allowance of US$46 million, reflecting Note 23 “Assets held for sale, held for sale” on page 329

units.source_text: 2 總額包括名義⾦額353億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備2,100萬美元，乃與2024年出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.
units.translation_en: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Total includes a notional amount of US$35.3 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$21 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

units.source_text: 3 總額包括名義⾦額27億美元，乃與2024年出售阿根廷業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Total includes a notional amount of US$2.7 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina operations in 2024.
